title: だってビートは止められない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and Trainer
<username>, please come up
to the stage!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on winning the Best Sprinter
award!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
You've had a fantastic year with all your victories
in G1 sprints and mile races!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Now, as this year's Best Sprinter, would you share
a few words with us?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for selecting me for this
prestigious award!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to receive this honor thanks to the
many people who kept pushing me forward and
supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank my fans, everyone at Tracen
Academy, all of the residents in my dorm, and
most of all...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Without you and with anyone but you, I would
never have been able to come this far.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I would be lost and confused, even now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So I want to take this moment to express my
gratitude for you properly. From the bottom of
my heart, thank you.
choice_data_list: The pleasure has been all mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki smiles softly before turning back to
the camera.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With that said, our journey is far from over! Even
more miracles await beyond the boundless sky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the snap of her fingers, fog billows from the
dry ice at her feet, bubbles float down from
above her, and jazz begins playing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Until we meet again! Take care!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki scoops me up in her arms, and we
make a flashy exit from the stage!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for pulling that on you without any warning.
Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Great! Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I was able to thank you out there. I
wanted to let everyone know.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted them to realize that, without you, Fuji
Kiseki wouldn't have been standing on that stage
either.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I wanted them to know that you're my
one-of-a-kind and utterly irreplaceable trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm looking forward to our continued
collaboration, my dear Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how the curtains fall on the awards
ceremony.
